null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Free Press Journal (Aug 8-15, 2025): roughly two-week monsoon-break/dry spell in MP with Bhopal receiving only light rain through Aug 14-15. Supports the dry-spell explanation for the warm anomaly — a seasonal-percentile exceedance, not a newsworthy heatwave.

Skymet (Jul 3, 2025): heavy-to-very-heavy rain and flood risk forecast for Bhopal and surrounding MP districts specifically for Jul 5-8, 2025. Forecast-consistent; no exact observed mm figure located.
